title: Use a Board Template with new dates
excerpt: We have several projects that repeat annually, but shift where they line up on the calendar. I would love a feature that could easily allow us to template one of our boards, them change/update the start date of the new b…

posts.author: tmk (Tyler Michaels King)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have several projects that repeat annually, but shift where they line up on the calendar. I would love a feature that could easily allow us to template one of our boards, them change/update the start date of the new board which would automatically update all of the task dates on the board, relative to the start date chosen.

I have researched a few options on how to do this with current features, and they seem overly cumbersome and complex compared to other project managers out there. Our team is small, and many of our tasks are not directly dependent on others, so creating more variables on our tasks to get something like this to work seems is not preferable.

Thanks you for the help and consideration!
